accepted.reason: Structured point generation with deterministic jitter provides reusable geometry/data-generation loops.
Linear-regression error and gradient accumulation is a clean numeric optimization kernel.
GA fitness evaluation with coverage checks is a strong nested-loop combinatorial workload.
Pairwise electrostatic-style accumulation is a classic high-value numerical kernel.
Cosine similarity and all-pairs matrix construction are common dense-vector optimization workloads.
Game-of-Life update step is a compact stencil-like cellular automata kernel.

skipped.reason: Hardware protocol binding/integration code is less suitable as general Cython optimization supervision.
Dataset container internals are framework-specific glue rather than reusable compute kernels.
Vendored pyzmq utility code is dependency/runtime glue, not ideal for conversion training.
Project-specific outlier routine appears tightly coupled and less transferable for generic optimization traces.
